articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (April 1)
articles.description:
ACTON 42 Lawsbrook Road. One-family Cape Cod, built in 1952, 1,707 square feet, 6 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 15,000-square-foot lot. $530,000 246 Main St. #2 Condo Town House, built in 2004, 1,040 square feet, 4 rooms, 2 bedrooms, 2 baths. $495,000 128 Parker St. #3B Condo Town House, built in 1989, 1,223 square […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (April 1) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Acton home at 42 Lawsbrook Road sold for $530,000 on April 1.
Condo at 246 Main St. #2 sold for $495,000, reflecting market trends.
Increased home sales indicate rising property values in Greater Boston.
